title: Here's Why You Should Retain IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Stock Now
text: IQVIA (IQV) rides on a solid healthcare-specific global IT infrastructure and analytics-driven clinical development skills. However, a weak balance sheet is worrisome.

title: Why Is IQVIA (IQV) Down 5.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: IQVIA (IQV) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: IQVIA (IQV) Strong on IT Infrastructure Despite Debt Woes

title: Elfun Trusts Storms Into Netflix, IQVIA in 1st Quarter
text: Elfun Trusts (Trades, Portfolio), part of Boston-based State Street Global Advisors, disclosed its first quarter portfolio this week, revealing that its top five trades included new holdings in Netflix Inc. ( NFLX , Financial) and IQVIA Holdings Inc. ( IQV , Financial), reductions to its positions in Mondelez International Inc. ( MDLZ , Financial) and JPMorgan Chase & Co. ( JPM , Financial) and the closure of its position in Sempra Energy ( SRE , Financial).
